title: Day 54 - Katakana Practice
html:
Day 54 - Katakana Practice

Please download today's katakana practice here: Katakana Practice Day 54.pdf

Practising writing every day is a very important exercise to help you learn quickly. If you have any questions you can always ask other students and teachers in the community here.

To learn and practice katakana you can watch this free YouTube tutorial: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yGRjcdyIIgs&list=PLw3jPCzGhgBPDc0a2k7OaJvsS_WvMiV6b
Check Yuko Sensei's playlist on the top right for more video lessons.
